title: Building a Simple Bookstore with ORM
statement: Create a RESTful API for a simple bookstore using Express and Sequelize. The bookstore has two resources: books and authors. Implement endpoints for CRUD operations on both resources. Ensure that all endpoints return the expected responses, including HTTP status codes and JSON output.
constraints: Must use Sequelize as the ORM tool.

endpoints.description: Retrieve a list of all books. Response should contain a list of book objects in JSON format.
Retrieve a book by its ID. Response should contain a single book object in JSON format.
Create a new book. Request body should contain the book's title, author ID, and publication year. Response should contain the newly created book with its ID.
Update an existing book. Request body should contain the updated book's title, author ID, and publication year. Response should contain the updated book with its ID.
Delete a book by its ID. Response should contain a success message.
Retrieve a list of all authors. Response should contain a list of author objects in JSON format.
Retrieve an author by its ID. Response should contain a single author object in JSON format.
Create a new author. Request body should contain the author's name and birth year. Response should contain the newly created author with its ID.
